channelsPageDescription: Filter, switch, and configure messaging channels in one continuous workspace.
channelsSelectTitle: Select a channel from the left to configure
channelsSelectDescription: Switch between channels continuously and save each configuration.
channelsEmptyDescription: Enable a messaging channel to start receiving messages.
channelDescTelegram: Connect with Telegram bots for instant messaging
channelDescSlack: Integrate with Slack workspaces for team collaboration
channelDescEmail: Send and receive messages via email protocols
channelDescWebhook: Receive HTTP webhooks for custom integrations
channelDescDiscord: Connect Discord bots to your community servers
channelDescWeixin: Use QR login and long-poll updates for personal Weixin messaging
